message:
refactor(engine): extract runtime hotspot optimization campaign into public module

Extract the runtime hotspot optimization campaign types and logic from the
integration test file into a proper public module so the types are reusable
across the crate and downstream consumers.

Module extraction (runtime_hotspot_optimization_campaign.rs — 1175 lines):
- Move all data types (HotspotEvidence, MetricVector, EvInputs,
  SemanticProofNote, CampaignRun, ReplayScenario, RuntimeHotspotCampaignFixture,
  CampaignResult) from test-only structs to pub types with Serialize/Deserialize
- Export core computation functions as pub: ev_score_millionths(),
  campaign_gain_millionths(), classify_runtime_lever(), compute_campaign_results(),
  rank_by_ev(), rank_by_gain(), selected_campaign(), emit_structured_events()
- Define campaign-wide constants (RUNTIME_HOTSPOT_EVENT_SCHEMA_VERSION,
  weight constants for scheduler/DOM/router/JS-WASM/interaction-p95)
- Add comprehensive unit tests within the module itself

Test file simplification:
- Replace inline struct definitions and computation logic with imports from
  the new module
- Test file now focuses purely on fixture-driven integration validation rather
  than reimplementing the business logic

RGC execution waves:
- Add commands.txt to the default wave handoff artifact manifest for
  complete evidence provenance tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
